content: {"analyses": [{"source_url": "https://www.emjreviews.com/general-healthcare/symposium/the-use-of-evidence-based-dietary-interventions-for-the-management-of-obesity/", "source_title": "The Use of Evidence-Based Dietary Interventions for the ... - EMJ", "source_type": "web", "source_quality": 0.7, "overall_relevance": 0.65, "year": 0, "authors": [], "venue": "", "doi": "", "atomic_facts": [{"statement": "Obesity has become a serious public health issue worldwide, with its prevalence steadily increasing.", "direct_quote": "Obesity has become a serious public health issue worldwide, with its prevalence steadily increasing.", "fact_category": "causal_link", "relevance_score": 0.55, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "A similar approach, which may also be a component of the VLCKD, is the use of total or partial replacement of meals using nutritionally...", "direct_quote": "A similar approach, which may also be a component of the VLCKD, is the use of total or partial replacement of meals using nutritionally complete shakes, bars, or soups.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.55, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "These may be combined with other weight loss measures, including bariatric surgery or medications.", "direct_quote": "These may be combined with other weight loss measures, including bariatric surgery or medications.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.55, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}], "evidence_summary": "Auto-extracted 3 facts from The Use of Evidence-Based Dietary Interventions for the ... ."}]}
